name: sabha-marketplace
description: Sabha OS — a local-first AI council protocol for Claude. In the Chanakya tradition: decisive, tradeoff-aware, grounded.

plugins.name: sabha-os
plugins.description: A local-first AI council protocol for Claude. Every substantive question is classified into a role (CIO, CAIO, CFO, CMO, CSO, CXO, CHRO, CEO) and answered in the Chanakya tradition — terse, decisive, recommendation-first. Pairs with a local memory MCP to build your Sakthi: an accumulated, locally-owned memory of every decision, person, and project. Deep skills shipped for CFO and CMO (frameworks from Kahneman, Christensen, Porter, McKinsey, Skok, and others). Live-data hooks documented for Stripe, QuickBooks, and Google Analytics.
